item.title: Mermaid Flowchart
item.dc:creator: Awesome Yi
item.description:
Basic syntax

Graph Types

  • left to right (LR)
  • top to bottom (TD)

Shapes

  • [rectangle]
  • {diamond}
  • (rounded)
  • ((circle))

Line Types

  • –> arrow line
  • -.- dashed line
  • — solid line
  • A –> B (from node A to node B)

References

Official documentation

item.title: Recent vocabulary
item.dc:creator: Awesome Yi
item.description:
Some English and Chinese vocabulary

  • 绥(sui)阳

  • caveat (warning)

  • snazzy (stylish)

  • tug of war (拔河)

  • fraudster (诈骗犯）

  • spoof (a funny and silly piece of writing, music, theatre, etc. that copies the style of an original work)

  • number spoofing (冒充电话号码）

  • hoax （a plan to deceive a large group of people; a trick）

  • malicious (intended to harm or upset other people)

item.title: Welcome To My Blog
item.dc:creator: Awesome Yi
item.description:
Welcome!

Hello there. I am Awesome Yi. This is my first post in this Quarto blog website. I am making a living as a Data Scientist in my everyday life. I am not a very active blogger, but I do share The World in My Eyes from time to time.

Outside my Data Life, I do enjoy walking and hiking in nature, as well as appreciating all natural elements. I occasioally make random movements with all sorts of music. You may call it “dancing” or “moving”. I also like traveling (I was a Southeast Asian backpacker over 15 years ago).

I used to live in New Zealand, but I am now staying with my whanau (family) in a small town in China. Come to China to see adorable gaint Pandas.

Last but not least, many thanks to open-source technologies from Posit and Quarto. They helped me constrcut this personal blog relatively easy.
